# marketing-demo 页面-路由-接口-数据表映射表

> Gate-3 必备；与 `03-PRD设计评审文档.md`（V1.1 冻结）、`04-界面设计文档.md`、`SDD-v1.0.json` 保持同步。

## 0. 界面元素映射（Gate-3 / 步骤4 冻结摘要）

| 页面ID | 界面元素 | 模块 | Mock API / Store | 需求 |
|--------|----------|------|------------------|------|
| P-01 | KPI 卡片 / 待办 | M00 | `marketingStore` 聚合 | MD-1 |
| P-02 | 三源同步卡片 | M01 | `POST /mock/marketing-demo/integration/sync` | MD-1 |
| P-03 | 14 类工商 Tab | M01 | `GET /mock/marketing-demo/business-info/{companyId}` | MD-1.1 |
| P-07~P-15 | 查询筛选+表格 | M02 | `GET /mock/marketing-demo/list/{dataset}` | MD-2~10 |
| P-16~P-19 | 图表看板 | M03 | Store 聚合 + 钻取跳转 | MD-11~15 |
| P-20~P-21 | 画像标签/历史 | M04 | `crud` profiles + 详情页 | MD-16 |
| P-22~P-23 | 报告模板/生成 | M05 | `POST /mock/marketing-demo/reports/generate` | MD-17 |
| P-24~P-26 | 协议模板/生命周期 | M06 | `PUT /mock/marketing-demo/agreements/{id}/status` | MD-18~20 |
| P-27~P-29 | 临期/流程/评估 | M07 | `PUT .../expiry-days` / `POST .../assessment` | MD-21~23 |

## 1. 页面-路由-Mock 映射（29 页）

| 模块 | 页面 | 路由 | Mock 函数 / API 路径 | 读写 Store 键 | 需求 |
|------|------|------|----------------------|---------------|------|
| M00 | 综合工作台 | `/marketing-demo/dashboard` | — | companies, messages, schedules | MD-1 |
| M01 | 接入总览 | `/data-integration/overview` | `syncIntegration` → `POST /mock/marketing-demo/integration/sync` | integration, syncLogs | MD-1 |
| M01 | 工商信息接入 | `/data-integration/business-info` | `getBusinessInfoTabs` → `GET /mock/marketing-demo/business-info/{companyId}` | companies | MD-1.1 |
| M01 | 交易数据接入 | `/data-integration/trade-data` | `queryList('tradeSettlement')` | tradeSettlement | MD-1.2 |
| M01 | 结算信息接入 | `/data-integration/settlement-data` | `queryList` | tradeSettlement | MD-1.3 |
| M01 | 接入治理 | `/data-integration/governance` | `saveGovernance` → `PUT /mock/marketing-demo/governance` | governance | MD-1.4 |
| M02 | 九维查询（9页） | `/query/*` | `queryList(dataset)` → `GET /mock/marketing-demo/list/{dataset}` | arrears, guarantees, agencyScale, tradeSettlement, dailyPnl 等 | MD-2~10 |
| M03 | 四维分析（4页） | `/analysis/*` | Store 读 + 钻取 | companies, dailyPnl | MD-11~15 |
| M04 | 画像列表/详情 | `/profile/*` | `crudList('profiles')` | profiles | MD-16 |
| M05 | 报告模板/生成 | `/report/*` | `generateReport` → `POST /mock/marketing-demo/reports/generate` | reportTemplates | MD-17 |
| M06 | 协议三页 | `/agreement/*` | `crud*` + `updateAgreementStatus` | agreements, agreementTemplates | MD-18~20 |
| M07 | 履约三页 | `/performance/*` | `saveExpiryDays`, `runAssessment` | expiryDays, performanceProcesses, assessmentReports | MD-21~23 |

## 2. dataset / apiKey 对照

| dataset / apiKey | Store 键 | 查询页 |
|------------------|----------|--------|
| `arrears` | arrears | P-08 |
| `guarantees` | guarantees | P-09 |
| `agencyScale` | agencyScale | P-10 |
| `tradeSettlement` | tradeSettlement | P-11 |
| `purchaseCost` | purchaseCost | P-12 |
| `retailPackage` | retailPackage | P-13 |
| `riskCredit` | riskCredit | P-14 |
| `dailyPnl` | dailyPnl | P-15 |
| `profiles` | profiles | P-20 |
| `reportTemplates` | reportTemplates | P-22 |
| `agreementTemplates` | agreementTemplates | P-24 |
| `agreements` | agreements | P-25 |
